proof.title: Dean's List — 2023/24 & 2024/25
proof.description: two consecutive years on the Dean's List at Fordham Lincoln Center. consistency over time.

proof.title: Alpha Sigma Nu — Jesuit Honor Society
proof.description: inducted into the national Jesuit honor society recognizing the top students for scholarship, loyalty, and service. fordham's highest academic honor.

proof.title: New York City Council Citation
proof.description: formally recognized by the NYC City Council for leadership and community impact. not something most college students have on their wall.

proof.title: Harvard National Model United Nations Certificate
proof.description: competed at Harvard NMUN — one of the most prestigious intercollegiate MUN conferences in the world.

proof.title: FTC Worlds Robotics Finalist
proof.description: made it to the FIRST Tech Challenge World Championship. years of after-school builds and late nights paid off.

proof.title: FTC Volunteer of the Year
proof.description: recognized for outstanding contribution to the FIRST Tech Challenge community — competing wasn't enough, had to give back too.

proof.title: DAAD German Academic Exchange — Data Science Intern
proof.description: selected for a competitive international research internship in dortmund, germany. built a production forecasting model using time series clustering and python. not bad for a summer.
